name: Noble Mandolin
description: Notes An unusual lute which does not grant Inspired, but compensates with a buff granting significant damage at the cost of your weapon’s shot speed (note that weapon range stays the same), as well as summoning a spinning ring of shots around your position. It also provides nice defensive bonuses on equip.
effects: Self Only: On use, lowers your shot speed by half for 4 seconds. ATT Boost (+10 ATT) for 4.5s Party Effect: Within 5 squares Damaging for 4.5 seconds Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles Turning: 150 degrees/sec Circular Motion: After 0.6s, shots turn 90 degrees before circling.
